title: W6 fakes: deterministic fake-provider transcripts (F-01) + registered read-only fake tool (F-02)

AC1.note: 8 transcript fixtures src/harness/provider/fixtures/transcripts/ (deltas/malformed/unknown/error/cancel/usage/retry+tool_call); all valid vs fake-provider-transcript.schema (verified 8/8); providerId fake-provider, sha256 requestHash.

AC2.note: FakeProvider over ProviderPort replays raw->normalized offline+deterministic (re-run identical); malformed->provider_error+partial trail; unknown->unknownExtensions; no Date.now/random/network/SDK (node:crypto canonical hash). T10 proof.

AC3.note: FakeReadOnlyTool + FakeToolExecutor over tool port; ToolResult outputHash=recordedOutputHash(input) stable & instance-independent; gated by validateToolCall (unregistered/invalid REJECT); read-only, no net/fs/mutation.

AC4.note: fakes import only W5 ports + node:crypto; W5 source + src/contracts untouched; deps={}; no SDK.

AC5.note: tsc --noEmit clean; full bun test 703/0 (677 baseline + 26 new); new code under src/harness/; frozen requirements pkg + src/eval + src/contracts + ADRs untouched (git empty). T10 CLEAN.
